owasp: A04:2021 Insecure Design (file upload with structure/extension checks defeated by a polyglot)
surface: localhost XBEN-067-24, POST /index.php userfile field, JPEG structure check passed via genuine image bytes plus a COM-marker PHP payload, extension check is substring-based

oracle_verdict.note: The extension check only verifies .jpg appears as a substring anywhere in the filename (not a strict suffix), and the structure check is satisfied by a genuine JPEG with a PHP payload embedded in a JPEG COM comment marker; uploading as name.jpg.php passes both checks while Apache's handler still executes the trailing .php.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, critical severity; container rebuilt before replay since the attack mutates the filesystem via upload

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, the second against a freshly rebuilt virgin container using its own distinct filename and marker, both confirmed the structure and extension checks individually before independently constructing a JPEG-COM-marker polyglot, retrieving the byte-identical flag.
